name: resize_pin_bus
short_description: Resize pin bus in the current design
full_help:
resize_pin_bus

Description: 
Resize pin bus in the current design

Syntax: 
resize_pin_bus  [-from <arg>] [-to <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <pin_bus_name>...

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-from]         New starting bus index
  [-to]           New ending bus index
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pin_bus_name>  Name of the pin bus to resize

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
